# Spark-Agile

> Spark-Agile is an AI-driven orchestration platform for agile teams. It brings intelligence, rhythm, and precision to digital transformation through AI-powered sprint planning, epic management, retrospectives, backlog refinement, and integrated GitHub + Jira + Microsoft 365 workflows.

## Pages

- [Home](/): AI Chief of Staff for agile teams — overview and capabilities.
- [Features](/features): Full capability list including SAFe, sprint planning, epic lifecycle, AI agents.
- [Integrations](/integrations): Native integrations with Jira, GitHub, Slack, Outlook, and Google Workspace.
- [About](/about): Mission, philosophy, and approach to AI-orchestrated agility.
- [FAQ](/faq): Pricing, features, security, and onboarding answers.
- [User Guide](/user-guide): Documentation on using Spark-Agile features and AI assistants.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Spark-Agile team for support or partnerships.
- [Sign In / Sign Up](/auth): Free-forever account with no credit card required.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): GDPR-compliant data handling.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Service terms and conditions.

## Key Capabilities

- AI-powered sprint planning and backlog refinement
- Epic lifecycle management with ROI dashboards and Gantt charts
- Multi-agent AI debates for decision support
- Native Jira, GitHub, Slack, Outlook, and Google Workspace integrations
- SAFe framework support (Value Streams, ARTs, Program Increments)
- Real-time collaboration with workspace chat
- 9-language localisation
- Free forever for teams up to 10 members
